questions.question_text: What is the primary role of Dr. Catalina Renström-Verdugo in relation to the asset?
questions.explanation: Dr. Catalina Renström-Verdugo is a pediatric oncologist and provides occasional consultation on pediatric-related civilian rescue operations.

questions.question_text: Which of the following is NOT a directorate of the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative?
questions.explanation: The Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative operates four directorates: Operations, Behavioral Health, Logistics, and the Cooperative Bureau of Metahuman Physics.

questions.question_text: What is the name of the parent organization of SLATEFALL, founded on 22 May 2014?
questions.explanation: The parent organization of SLATEFALL is the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC), founded on 22 May 2014.

questions.question_text: Which civilian ally operates a small import-export consultancy as cover in La Paz?
questions.explanation: Pajarera / Tessa Roehl is a civilian intelligence asset who operates a small import-export consultancy as cover in La Paz.

questions.question_text: What is the name of the senior psychologist who is the asset's continuing mental-health practitioner since 2020?
questions.explanation: Dr. Maite Borghi-Castelnuovo is the senior psychologist who is the asset's continuing mental-health practitioner since 2020.

questions.question_text: What is the total floor area of the primary operational base, Cuartel Valparaíso?
questions.explanation: The total floor area of Cuartel Valparaíso is given as 4,820 m² in the section text.

questions.question_text: Which of the following countries is NOT fully included in the asset's authorized operational territory?

options.D: Ecuador and Paraguay partially, but also some parts of Argentina are excluded

questions.correct_text: Ecuador and Paraguay partially, but also some parts of Argentina are excluded
questions.user_answer_text: Ecuador and Paraguay partially, but also some parts of Argentina are excluded
questions.explanation: The asset's operational territory includes all of Chile, Bolivia, and parts of Peru, Argentina, and Ecuador, but not all of these countries.

questions.question_text: Which safehouse is located in a port district and has a maritime cover?
questions.explanation: The safehouse S-3 is located in Iquique, Tarapacá, and has a maritime cover in a port district.

questions.question_text: What is the reason for the restriction on the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring zone?
questions.explanation: The Cerro Castillo exclusion ring zone is restricted due to psychological reasons, based on a CBMP recommendation since 2020.

questions.question_text: Which of the following is NOT a type of cover used by the asset's safehouses?
questions.explanation: The types of covers used by the asset's safehouses include residential, industrial, and religious-order, but not diplomatic.

questions.question_text: In which year was the case 2019-0017: Probationary Assessment (Atacama) conducted?
questions.explanation: The case 2019-0017: Probationary Assessment (Atacama) was conducted in 2019, as stated in the case details.

questions.question_text: What is the format for recording case numbers in the PAMC format?
questions.explanation: The PAMC format records case numbers as Year-Sequence, as seen in the case file format section.

questions.question_text: Which of the following cases had an outcome of Pyrrhic?
questions.explanation: The case 2022-0123: Tropopausa First Engagement (Mendoza) had an outcome of Pyrrhic, as stated in the case details.

questions.question_text: What was the result of the case 2024-0034: Tarapacá Concession Raid in terms of Concession affiliates captured?
questions.explanation: The case 2024-0034: Tarapacá Concession Raid resulted in 14 Concession affiliates captured, as stated in the case details.

questions.question_text: Which of the following is NOT a type of casualty recorded in the PAMC case file format?
questions.explanation: The PAMC case file format records operative, civilian, and adversary casualties, but does not specifically record environmental casualties.
